Live Workshops and Seminars

Hands-on workshops give you the chance to propel your career with leading instructors and trending topics. Dive in and emerge as a better clinician!

Live Workshop and Seminar Schedule

2026
June 12–13 Botulinum Toxins, Dermal Fillers, TMJ Pain Therapy and Gum Regeneration
Sept. 8–16 Travel Destination CE: Pharmacology — Your Most Valuable Instrument in Treating Today’s Medically Complex Dental Patient, Umbria, Italy
Sept. 11–12 Botulinum Toxins, Dermal Fillers, TMJ Pain Therapy and Gum Regeneration
Oct. 29–Nov. 6 Travel Destination CE: Pharmacology — Your Most Valuable Instrument in Treating Today’s Medically Complex Dental Patient, Barcelona, Spain
Nov. 6–7 Botulinum Toxins, Dermal Fillers, TMJ Pain Therapy and Gum Regeneration
Botulinum Toxins, Dermal Fillers, TMJ Pain Therapy and Gum Regeneration

Expand your practice’s offerings with the #1 live-patient training courses. (3 dates available in 2026.)

Learn more

Elevate your practice and explore inspiring destinations 

Travel Destination CE: Pharmacology in Umbria, Italy
Sept. 8-16; Learn how to provide safe and effective treatment to your medically complex patients.
Travel Destination CE: Pharmacology in Barcelona
Oct. 29-Nov. 6; Learn to provide safe and effective treatment to your medically complex patients.
